reference: Hello Doctor, my father has been diagnosed with gallstones and a tumor in the gallbladder. He has been advised to undergo major surgery to remove the gallbladder, but I am very concerned because he is a heart patient. In two thousand and six, he underwent angioplasty, and in two thousand and twelve, he suffered a second heart attack. Additionally, he is sixty-four years old. Is there any alternative to this surgery? Considering his physical condition, I am unwilling to have him operated on. Could you please suggest the best options?
text: Hello doctor, my father has been diagnosed with gallstones and a tumor in the gallbladder. He has been advised to undergo major surgery to remove the gallbladder, but I am very concerned because he is a heart. In two thousand and six, he underwent angioplasty, and in two thousand and twelve, he suffered a second heart attack. Additionally, he is sixty four years old. Is there any alternative to this surgery, considering his physical condition? I am unwilling to have him operated on. Could you please suggest the best option?
